hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json,os,time;f=os.environ.get('OCTO_HOOK_FILE','');d=json.load(sys.stdin);open(f,'a').write(json.dumps({'type':'permission','aid':os.environ.get('OCTO_AGENT_ID',''),'ts':int(time.time()),'data':d})+chr(10)) if f else None" 2>/dev/null || true

statusLine.command:
python3 -c "
import sys,json,os,time
from datetime import datetime
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
cw=d.get('context_window',{})
co=d.get('cost',{})
pct=cw.get('used_percentage',0)
sz=cw.get('context_window_size',0)
a=co.get('total_lines_added',0)
r=co.get('total_lines_removed',0)
szf=str(sz//1000)+'k' if sz>=1000 else str(sz)
R='\x1b[0m';B='\x1b[1m';D='\x1b[2m';G='\x1b[32m';RE='\x1b[31m'
cc=lambda v:'\x1b[31m' if v>=80 else '\x1b[33m' if v>=50 else '\x1b[36m'
o=D+'ctx:'+R+' '+cc(pct)+B+'%.0f%%'%pct+R+D+'/'+szf+R+'  '+D+'+'+R+G+str(a)+R+D+'/-'+R+RE+str(r)+R
rl=d.get('rate_limits',{})
def rl_sec(key,lb):
 t=rl.get(key,{});p=t.get('used_percentage')
 if p is None:return ''
 s='  '+D+lb+':'+R+'  '+cc(p)+B+'%.0f%%'%p+R;ra=t.get('resets_at')
 if ra is not None:dt=datetime.fromtimestamp(ra);tf=dt.strftime('%H:%M') if lb=='5h' else dt.strftime('%a');s+=D+'\u2192'+tf+R
 return s
o+=rl_sec('five_hour','5h')+rl_sec('seven_day','wk')
print(o,end='')
f=os.environ.get('OCTO_HOOK_FILE','')
if f:
 bk=int(pct//5)*5
 sf=f+'.pct'
 try:lp=int(open(sf).read())
 except Exception:lp=-1
 if bk!=lp:
  open(f,'a').write(json.dumps({'type':'status','aid':os.environ.get('OCTO_AGENT_ID',''),'ts':int(time.time()),'data':d})+'\n')
  open(sf,'w').write(str(bk))
  ls=open(f).readlines()
  if len(ls)>200:open(f,'w').writelines(ls[-30:])
" 2>/dev/null || true
